current_wind.description: Moderate wind from NNW, gusts to 16.1 mph

bh.shot_strategy: Player, battle the headwind with a clean hyzer. Focus on keeping the flight plate down to prevent it from lifting.

fh.shot_strategy: Champ, aim for a straight shot with an overstable driver. A clean, controlled release is key here.

bh.shot_strategy: Player, use an overstable disc on hyzer to counter the strong headwind.

fh.shot_strategy: Champ, a straight shot with an overstable driver is the play against this headwind.

bh.shot_strategy: Player, lean into an overstable disc with a hyzer to fight this headwind. Control your release angle.

fh.shot_strategy: Champ, a stable driver thrown with moderate power straight into the headwind should work.

bh.shot_strategy: Player, an overstable disc on hyzer is your best bet against this headwind.

fh.shot_strategy: Champ, focus on a clean, straight shot with an overstable driver.

bh.shot_strategy: Player, the wind is pushing right. Use a stable fairway driver with a slight hyzer to counteract. Watch for the disc turning right.

fh.shot_strategy: Champ, a controlled forehand with a stable driver should fight the crosswind effectively. Aim slightly left of the target.

bh.shot_strategy: Player, the wind is pushing right, and a natural LHBH fade also goes right. Use an understable disc and aim to let it drift right into the wind.

fh.shot_strategy: Champ, a strong forehand with an overstable disc will be needed to fight this left-to-right wind. Focus on keeping it straight.

bh.shot_strategy: Player, this wind is pushing left. A controlled hyzer or anhyzer shot with a stable driver should work. Aim to let the wind bring it back.

fh.shot_strategy: Champ, a clean forehand with a stable driver is a good option here. Aim to keep it from cutting left too much.

bh.shot_strategy: Player, the wind pushes left. A natural LHBH fade also goes left. You'll need to throw an anhyzer with an understable disc to combat this.

fh.shot_strategy: Champ, a strong forehand with an overstable disc will help keep it straight against this wind.

bh.shot_strategy: Player, the wind is pushing left. A hyzer with a stable fairway driver will help keep it on target. Be mindful of it drifting left.

fh.shot_strategy: Champ, a controlled forehand with a stable driver should hold its line well. Aim slightly right of the target.

bh.shot_strategy: Player, this wind pushes left. Use an understable disc on an anhyzer line to fight the wind and bring it back towards the basket.

fh.shot_strategy: Champ, you'll need an overstable driver for a strong forehand to combat this wind pushing left.

bh.shot_strategy: Player, a slight headwind and crosswind from the left. A stable driver on a controlled hyzer should do the trick.

fh.shot_strategy: Champ, a straight forehand with a stable driver is a good play here. Be aware of the wind pushing it slightly left.

bh.shot_strategy: Player, a stable driver on hyzer should manage this slight headwind and crosswind.

fh.shot_strategy: Champ, aim for a straight shot with a stable driver.

bh.shot_strategy: Player, this is a tailwind/crosswind from the right. Use an understable driver for maximum distance, thrown with a slight hyzer to keep it from turning over too much.

fh.shot_strategy: Champ, a smooth forehand with an understable driver can get you great distance downwind. Aim to keep it straight.

bh.shot_strategy: Player, in this tailwind, an understable disc on a straight line or slight anhyzer will carry far. Be careful of it drifting right.
